title: LivelyDanmaku
description: I hope to bring you a more free danmaku experience
body:
# Lively Danmaku As a touhou fanmade mod,I hope to bring you a more free danmaku experience.Inspired by the touhou little maid.
Danmaku battle must be lively.
It's my first time to take part in TeaCon.
Hope everyone has a fun and lively time
You may need Patchouli to get tutorial of how to use and play
# Authors Programmer:Crystal1921
Artist:Da_Black, LibeccioEA, armadillo_core_
# Credits ZUN: Made the Touhou Project
TartaricAcid:Touhou Little Maid
